meta.dc:title: Continuance of present officers and employees

section.heading: Continuance of present officers and employees

content.p: The present officers and employees shall, without interruption, continue to perform the duties of their respective offices and employments for the compensation provided by existing ordinances, resolutions, rules or laws, until the appointment, or election, and qualification of their successors under this Charter and subject to such removal and control as is provided in this Charter.
